name: pr-to-video
description: turn a GitHub pull request (a PR URL like github.com/<owner>/<repo>/pull/<N>, an <owner>/<repo>#<N> ref, or 'this PR' in a checked-out repo) into a code-change explainer video, up to ~3 min (sweet spot 30-90s) — changelog, feature reveal, fix, or refactor walkthrough, rendered from the diff / commits / files. The input is a CODE CHANGE read via the gh CLI; there is no website capture. Use this skill for a GitHub PR. Do not use it for a product launch/promo (use /product-launch-video), a tour of
author: heygen-com
